untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition (three advancing white candles + gravestone doji formation) and identification of channel boundaries/congestion zones. These require multi-candle pattern detection and dynamic support/resistance levels not expressible with single-bar indicators. The specific target price (e.g., 33) is also context-dependent and cannot be parameterized.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture core mechanics: lower_wick < body detects gravestone doji (small body, long lower wick), close < prev_low confirms breakdown below doji low. Exit uses reversal logic (close > prev_high). However, the three-candle uptrend confirmation, channel identification, and congestion zone targeting require pattern matching capabilities beyond the allowed indicator set.
